mapper.select: SELECT HOMEPAGE_ID, MEMBER_ID, ORGA_IDX FROM CMS_MEMBER_ORGANIZATION WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{member_id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CMS_MEMBER_ORGANIZATION ( HOMEPAGE_ID, MEMBER_ID, ORGA_IDX ) VALUES ( #{homepage_id}, #{member_id}, #{orga_idx} )
mapper.select: SELECT HOMEPAGE_ID, MEMBER_ID, MEMBER_NAME, PHONE, CELL_PHONE, EMAIL FROM CMS_MEMBER WHERE MEMBER_ID IN (SELECT MEMBER_ID FROM CMS_MEMBER_ORGANIZATION WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND ORGA_IDX = #{orga_idx})

SELECT HOMEPAGE_ID, MEMBER_ID, MEMBER_NAME, PHONE, CELL_PHONE, EMAIL FROM CMS_MEMBER WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND MEMBER_ID NOT IN (SELECT MEMBER_ID FROM CMS_MEMBER_ORGANIZATION WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND ORGA_IDX = #{orga_idx})
AND ( MEMBER_ID LIKE '%'||#{search_text}||'%' OR MEMBER_NAME LIKE '%'||#{search_text}||'%' )
